design_philosophy: High energy, dirt, adrenaline. Grunge street-poster aesthetic meets modern digital kinetic typography. Break the grid intentionally, use massive contrast, and tell a story of chaos structured by discipline.

fonts.usage: Massive sizes (text-5xl to text-7xl+). MUST use uppercase and tracking-tighter. Use for Hero, Section Titles, and Kinetic Marquee.
Countdown timer, rider classes (50cc, 110cc), payout amounts, schedule times. Adds mechanical precision.
Paragraphs, forms, registration details. Highly legible to offset chaotic headings.

rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings. AI defaults are forbidden.
Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tighter.
Max hero size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem). No text-9xl jumps.
DO NOT center align typography globally. Left-align text for tension and readability.
Backgrounds must be predominantly solid black or darkest zinc.
Use Yellow, Pink, and Cyan purely as high-voltage accents (borders, text highlights, buttons).
NEVER use generic full-screen gradients. Use solid color blocks or raw textures.

textures: Distressed noise/grain overlay on the entire body (opacity-20, mix-blend-overlay).
Checkered flag motifs used as thick border-bottoms or subtle container backgrounds (black/white or tinted cyan).
visual_enhancers.shapes: Sharp angles, aggressive diagonals (skew-y-3 on accents), and zero border-radius (`rounded-none`). No soft neumorphic shadows.

layouts.general: Asymmetric, overlapping elements. Use the 'Tetris' grid layout with generous spacing.

hero.description: Full height (min-h-screen). Background image of dirt bike jump with heavy bg-black/60 overlay. Massive staggered line-by-line text reveal of 'RIDE HARD / CAUSE MAYHEM / HAVE FUN'. Text overlaps.

manifesto_chapters.description: Large outline numbers (1, 2, 3) in bg using text-transparent and stroke (text-border). Content heavily padded (p-8 or p-12), broken from the standard column grid.

classes_grid.description: Dense, thick 2px solid borders around class cards. Bright yellow/pink hover states that invert the card color.

admin_dashboard.description: For managing registrations. Sharp edges, 1px cyan borders, JetBrains Mono for data tables. Deep black backgrounds with yellow accents for primary actions. Strict cardless grid.

buttons.classes: px-8 py-4 bg-brand_yellow text-black font-anton uppercase tracking-widest text-xl rounded-none border-2 border-transparent hover:bg-black hover:text-brand_yellow hover:border-brand_yellow hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform transition-colors duration-200 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#ec4899] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#ec4899]

cards.classes: bg-surface border-2 border-zinc-800 p-8 rounded-none relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-brand_cyan transition-colors

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/70 border-b-2 border-zinc-800

motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY for momentum.
motion.reveal: Framer Motion line-by-line text masks (`overflow-hidden`, child `motion.div` translates y from 100% to 0%).
motion.marquee: React Fast Marquee for 'EDITORIAL RIBBON' - massive outline text running in the background behind the schedule section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Hero requires bg-black/60.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Provide fallback states for heavy animations.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

images.description: Person jumping a dirt bike in the air. Use as full-screen hero background.
Exciting motocross jump. Use for event showcase (Barrels/Poles).
Young child riding a dirt bike. Use for 50cc/65cc class details layout.
Checkered fabric. Use as background texture in schedule, sponsor wall, or footer.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js and .jsx files, not .tsx. Do not use TypeScript.
Install custom fonts using standard @import or link tags (Anton, JetBrains Mono, Manrope).
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling in a top-level layout wrapper.
Construct the Hero section with Framer Motion text reveals. Ensure the background image has a dark overlay (bg-black/60) so text is legible.
Build the Countdown Timer to July 25, 2026 using JetBrains Mono, with large numbers and pink/cyan accents.
For the Schedule/Classes grid, use sharp square borders, no border radius, and high contrast hover effects.
Create a Marquee section using react-fast-marquee. Make the text massive, outlined, and uppercase.
Integrate Shadcn forms for the Rider Registration flow and Admin Dashboard, customizing the UI to match the brutalist aesthetic (remove rounded corners, use thick borders).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do not use generic text. Use 'MOTO Mayhem Rodeo', 'July 25, 2026', 'Ed Hughes Memorial Arena', 'Gold\'s Bakery' throughout the design.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic layouts. Avoid standard Vercel-look borders and soft shadows.
Create depth through sharp layered elements, not blurs. Use z-index hierarchy.
Never apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties.
Do not center align app text globally. Ensure reading flow is natural and tense.
Use 2-3x more spacing than usual. Let sections breathe heavily.
Never use AI emoji placeholders for icons.
Use solid rectangular buttons with offset brutalist shadows and dynamic interactions.
